exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width, lower hips as if sitting, push through heels to stand.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.description: Stand front of bench, place back foot on bench, lower front knee to 90 degrees.

exercises.name: Forward Lunge
exercises.description: Step forward, lower until both knees at 90 degrees, push through front heel.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.description: Step back into lunge, lower hips, push through front foot to return.

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge
exercises.description: Step sideways, keep one leg straight, lower hips by bending stepping knee.

exercises.name: Jump Squat
exercises.description: Squat down, explode upward into a jump, land softly and repeat.

exercises.name: Pistol Squat
exercises.description: Stand on one leg, extend other leg forward, squat until thigh is parallel, stand back up.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.description: Lie on back, knees bent, press through heels to lift hips until body forms straight line.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.description: Glute bridge with one leg extended, keep hips level.

exercises.name: Wall Sit
exercises.description: Lean against wall, slide down until knees at 90 degrees, hold.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Push-Up
exercises.description: Push-up with hands wider than shoulder-width, emphasizes outer chest.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Up
exercises.description: Hands on elevated surface (bench), lower chest to surface, push back up.

exercises.name: Decline Push-Up
exercises.description: Feet on elevated surface, hands on floor, lower chest toward hands.

exercises.name: Archer Push-Up
exercises.description: Wide push-up position, shift weight to one arm, bend that arm while keeping other straight.

exercises.name: One-Leg Push-Up
exercises.description: Push-up with one leg lifted, increases chest and core engagement.

exercises.name: Side-to-Side Push-Up
exercises.description: Shift body weight from one side to the other while staying low in push-up position.

exercises.name: Plyometric Push-Up
exercises.description: Push up with enough force to lift hands off floor, clap before landing.

exercises.name: Standard Push-Up
exercises.description: Hands shoulder-width, lower chest to floor, push back up.

exercises.name: Diamond Push-Up
exercises.description: Hands form diamond shape under chest, emphasizes triceps and inner chest.

exercises.name: Pike Push-Up
exercises.description: Pike position with hips high, lower head toward floor, push back up.

exercises.name: Bench Dips (Triceps)
exercises.description: Hands on bench edge behind you, lower body by bending elbows to 90 degrees.

exercises.name: Reverse Plank Push-Up
exercises.description: Reverse plank position, bend elbows to lower body, push back up.

exercises.name: Cobra Push-Up
exercises.description: Lie prone, push through hands to straighten arms, keep hips on floor.

exercises.name: Bicep Push-Up (Hand Rotation)
exercises.description: Push-up position with hands rotated backward, lower and push.

exercises.name: Table Inverted Row
exercises.description: Under sturdy table, pull chest to table underside, lower with control.

exercises.name: Door Frame Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Grip doorframe, lean back until arm extended, curl back up using biceps.

exercises.name: Inchworm
exercises.description: Stand, bend forward, walk hands to plank, walk feet back to hands.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Push-Up
exercises.description: Hands closer together than shoulder-width, keep elbows tucked.

exercises.name: Plank to Push-Up
exercises.description: Forearm plank, push up onto hands one arm at a time, alternate lead arm.

exercises.name: Wall Push-Up
exercises.description: Stand arm's length from wall, lean in until elbows at 90 degrees, push back.

exercises.name: Prone Lat Pulls
exercises.description: Lie face down, pull elbows down and back toward hips, squeeze shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Reverse Snow Angels
exercises.description: Lie face down, sweep arms overhead keeping them off ground, then pull back.

exercises.name: Wall Slides
exercises.description: Back against wall in goalpost position, slide arms up and down maintaining contact.

exercises.name: Floor Slides
exercises.description: Lie on stomach, push elbows into floor and slide hands forward, then pull back.

exercises.name: Superman Hold
exercises.description: Lie face down, lift arms and legs off floor, hold.

exercises.name: W Raises
exercises.description: Lie face down, arms extended in W position, lift and squeeze shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Prone Lateral Raises
exercises.description: Lie face down, arms extended, lift arms keeping them straight, squeeze shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Towel Doorway Rows
exercises.description: Loop towel over door, pull body toward door keeping body straight.

exercises.name: Doorway Rows
exercises.description: Grip doorframe, lean back with arms extended, pull body forward.

exercises.name: Good Mornings (Bodyweight)
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width, hinge at hips keeping back flat, return to standing.

exercises.name: Bear Crawl
exercises.description: On hands and knees with knees lifted, move forward alternating hand and opposite foot.

exercises.name: Lateral Plank Walk
exercises.description: High plank position, step sideways with one hand and same-side foot, follow with other.

exercises.name: Arm Circles
exercises.description: Extend arms to sides, make small circles, gradually increase size.

exercises.name: Wall Angels
exercises.description: Back against wall in goalpost position, slide arms up and down keeping contact.

exercises.name: Shoulder Y-Raise
exercises.description: Lie on side, raise arm in Y shape keeping elbow straight.

exercises.name: Push-Up Shoulder Taps
exercises.description: Push-up, at top tap opposite shoulder with one hand, alternate.

exercises.name: Handstand Push-Up (Wall)
exercises.description: Kick up into wall handstand, lower head to floor, push back up.

exercises.name: Plank to Downward Dog
exercises.description: From plank, push hips up and back into downward dog, return to plank.

exercises.name: Pike Push-Up (Shoulders Focus)
exercises.description: Pike position, lower head toward floor keeping forearms vertical, push back up.

exercises.name: Single Arm Side Plank Rotation
exercises.description: Side plank, rotate torso reaching top arm under body, return.
